urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Indian activist on hunger strike for 20 days forcibly taken to hospital
latest.summary: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting in support of the Cockroach Janta Party, which seeks educational reforms.
latest.details: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting in support of the Cockroach Janta Party, which seeks educational reforms. Wangchuk was forcibly removed from his protest site by police and taken to a government hospital for medical intervention. He had lost over 9kg during his hunger strike and was in significant pain.
latest.full_brief: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting in support of the Cockroach Janta Party, which seeks educational reforms. Wangchuk was forcibly removed from his protest site by police and taken to a government hospital for medical intervention. He had lost over 9kg during his hunger strike and was in significant pain.

latest.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
latest.summary: The US military has conducted strikes on Iran for the seventh consecutive night following the declaration that the temporary ceasefire agreement was 'over. ' US Central Command reported targeting various military sites, including surveillance and logistics infrastructure.
latest.details: The US military has conducted strikes on Iran for the seventh consecutive night following the declaration that the temporary ceasefire agreement was 'over.' US Central Command reported targeting various military sites, including surveillance and logistics infrastructure. Iran's Revolutionary Guards claimed that two oil tankers exploded in the Strait of Hormuz, a claim that Centcom dismissed as false. Shipping traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has significantly decreased due to ongoing hostilities between US and Iranian forces.
latest.full_brief: The US military has conducted strikes on Iran for the seventh consecutive night following the declaration that the temporary ceasefire agreement was 'over.' US Central Command reported targeting various military sites, including surveillance and logistics infrastructure. Iran's Revolutionary Guards claimed that two oil tankers exploded in the Strait of Hormuz, a claim that Centcom dismissed as false. Shipping traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has significantly decreased due to ongoing hostilities between US and Iranian forces.

latest.title: What this desert city can teach the world about tackling heat deaths
latest.summary: Extreme temperatures have become a new normal, with significant heat-related deaths reported in various countries. Phoenix, Arizona, has implemented programs to reduce heat deaths, including access to cooling centers and air conditioning.
latest.details: Extreme temperatures have become a new normal, with significant heat-related deaths reported in various countries. Phoenix, Arizona, has implemented programs to reduce heat deaths, including access to cooling centers and air conditioning. The city hired a heat officer in 2021, becoming the first in the world to do so. After a peak of 645 heat-related deaths in 2023, the number declined to 405 in 2025, attributed to policy changes.
latest.full_brief: Extreme temperatures have become a new normal, with significant heat-related deaths reported in various countries. Phoenix, Arizona, has implemented programs to reduce heat deaths, including access to cooling centers and air conditioning. The city hired a heat officer in 2021, becoming the first in the world to do so. After a peak of 645 heat-related deaths in 2023, the number declined to 405 in 2025, attributed to policy changes.

latest.title: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
latest.summary: Argentina's national football team faces potential disciplinary action from FIFA for displaying a political banner regarding the Falklands. The banner read 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas,' which translates to 'The Falklands are Argentine.
latest.details: Argentina's national football team faces potential disciplinary action from FIFA for displaying a political banner regarding the Falklands. The banner read 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas,' which translates to 'The Falklands are Argentine.' The White House has defended the team's right to free speech under the US Constitution. The Falklands remain a disputed territory between the UK and Argentina, with a history of conflict over sovereignty.
latest.full_brief: Argentina's national football team faces potential disciplinary action from FIFA for displaying a political banner regarding the Falklands. The banner read 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas,' which translates to 'The Falklands are Argentine.' The White House has defended the team's right to free speech under the US Constitution. The Falklands remain a disputed territory between the UK and Argentina, with a history of conflict over sovereignty.

latest.title: Australia updates travel advice for Laos as charges announced over mass methanol poisoning
latest.summary: The Australian government has raised its travel alert for Laos due to a recent mass methanol poisoning incident. Six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers, died after consuming methanol at a hostel.
latest.details: The Australian government has raised its travel alert for Laos due to a recent mass methanol poisoning incident. Six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers, died after consuming methanol at a hostel. A distillery owner has been charged, but could face only three months in jail for the alleged offenses. The case remains open for 15 years, allowing for more serious charges if sufficient evidence is found.
latest.full_brief: The Australian government has raised its travel alert for Laos due to a recent mass methanol poisoning incident. Six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers, died after consuming methanol at a hostel. A distillery owner has been charged, but could face only three months in jail for the alleged offenses. The case remains open for 15 years, allowing for more serious charges if sufficient evidence is found.

latest.title: Taco Bell removes lettuce from menu in US after links to explosive diarrhoea parasite
latest.summary: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people in five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations.
latest.details: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people in five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations. The FDA advised against consuming the affected lettuce, which is sourced from Mexico. Taco Bell's supplier, Taylor Farms, is voluntarily removing the lettuce from the market.
latest.full_brief: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people in five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations. The FDA advised against consuming the affected lettuce, which is sourced from Mexico. Taco Bell's supplier, Taylor Farms, is voluntarily removing the lettuce from the market.

latest.title: ‘We are preserving a tradition’: how Ghana’s sensationalist film posters became collectible art
latest.summary: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations.
latest.details: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations. The practice declined with the rise of personal televisions, but interest in these artworks has surged due to online marketing. Deadly Prey Gallery, co-founded by Robert Kofi, works to preserve this art form and connect artists with a global audience.
latest.full_brief: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations. The practice declined with the rise of personal televisions, but interest in these artworks has surged due to online marketing. Deadly Prey Gallery, co-founded by Robert Kofi, works to preserve this art form and connect artists with a global audience.

latest.title: Doctors failed to spot my hidden condition for so long I was left permanently disabled
latest.summary: Etchells experienced extremely heavy periods and excruciating pain, which led her to seek medical help multiple times. Despite being prescribed the pill, her condition worsened, resulting in a permanent physical disability due to endometriosis.
latest.details: Etchells experienced extremely heavy periods and excruciating pain, which led her to seek medical help multiple times. Despite being prescribed the pill, her condition worsened, resulting in a permanent physical disability due to endometriosis. She described her experience as 'medical gaslighting,' where her health concerns were dismissed by professionals. Eventually, a female GP helped her by prescribing medication and referring her to a gynaecologist.
latest.full_brief: Etchells experienced extremely heavy periods and excruciating pain, which led her to seek medical help multiple times. Despite being prescribed the pill, her condition worsened, resulting in a permanent physical disability due to endometriosis. She described her experience as 'medical gaslighting,' where her health concerns were dismissed by professionals. Eventually, a female GP helped her by prescribing medication and referring her to a gynaecologist.

latest.title: What to know about the Canadian and US wildfires and their impact
latest.summary: Intense smoke from wildfires in Canada is affecting cities across the northeastern US and Canada. The Namaygoosisagagun First Nation in Ontario has been severely impacted, with community members forced to evacuate.
latest.details: Intense smoke from wildfires in Canada is affecting cities across the northeastern US and Canada. The Namaygoosisagagun First Nation in Ontario has been severely impacted, with community members forced to evacuate. Currently, there are about 888 wildfires burning in Canada, with nearly 200 in Ontario alone. The hot weather and dry conditions have contributed to the rapid increase in wildfire outbreaks.
latest.full_brief: Intense smoke from wildfires in Canada is affecting cities across the northeastern US and Canada. The Namaygoosisagagun First Nation in Ontario has been severely impacted, with community members forced to evacuate. Currently, there are about 888 wildfires burning in Canada, with nearly 200 in Ontario alone. The hot weather and dry conditions have contributed to the rapid increase in wildfire outbreaks.

latest.title: NASA Pushes New Wing Design to Find Structural Limits
latest.summary: NASA's new wing design, known as SWEET-15, underwent rigorous testing to determine its structural limits. The wing was designed to be lightweight and efficient, incorporating advanced composite manufacturing technologies.
latest.details: NASA's new wing design, known as SWEET-15, underwent rigorous testing to determine its structural limits. The wing was designed to be lightweight and efficient, incorporating advanced composite manufacturing technologies. Initial tests showed that the wing could withstand forces beyond its intended limits, providing confidence in its design. This testing marks a significant step in developing future ultra-efficient aircraft.
latest.full_brief: NASA's new wing design, known as SWEET-15, underwent rigorous testing to determine its structural limits. The wing was designed to be lightweight and efficient, incorporating advanced composite manufacturing technologies. Initial tests showed that the wing could withstand forces beyond its intended limits, providing confidence in its design. This testing marks a significant step in developing future ultra-efficient aircraft.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
